dialogues.text: Alright. Here we go. WarGames is a dangerous contest at the height of the Cold War paranoia, with the fate of humanity hanging in the balance. David Lightman is a brilliant teenaged hacker and gamer who accidentally infiltrates NORAD's war operation plan response, or Whopper computer system and mistakenly initiates a game of global thermonuclear war. Little does David realize that the Air Force has just placed Whopper in command of its nuclear launch capability, and the system will launch an all out first strike nuclear attack against the Soviet Union in just a few days time. David, teaming up with his beautiful schoolmate, Jennifer, will be pursued by government forces as he navigates the maze of intrigue laid down by Whoppers creator, the enigmatic Dr. Falken, will David prove to be a worthy opponent find the solution to his battle?
